message:
fix: Android TV focus containment and D-pad navigation

- Wrap channels screen in PopScope(canPop: false) to prevent accidental exit
- Add FocusTraversalGroup with WidgetOrderTraversalPolicy for ordered traversal
- Manually handle D-pad arrow key traversal to prevent focus escaping app
- Make channel list items individually focusable with visible white focus borders
- Channel items auto-select on focus and open fullscreen on CENTER/SELECT
- Default to channel list view (not guide) on Android for better D-pad UX
- Outer Focus uses skipTraversal on Android so children get autofocus
- Top bar wrapped in FocusTraversalGroup for LEFT/RIGHT icon navigation
- Player screen: use channelUp/Down (not arrows) on Android, handle SELECT
- Player: BACK/goBack key pops route instead of exiting app

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
